summary: Adding process_priority parameter to click.edit()/Editor class for CPU priority control of editor subprocess

fields.summary: Adding process_priority parameter to click.edit()/Editor class for CPU priority control of editor subprocess

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
summary: Added process_priority param to Editor.__init__ and click.edit(); added Editor._apply_process_priority(pid) helper; edit_file() now calls self._apply_process_priority(c.pid) after Popen. If you rename edit_file->edit_files, please keep the _apply_process_priority call after each Popen so both features compose.

fields.summary: Added process_priority param to Editor.__init__ and click.edit(); added Editor._apply_process_priority(pid) helper; edit_file() now calls self._apply_process_priority(c.pid) after Popen.
